tasks.title: Add unit tests for InputSanitizer
tasks.description: Cover sanitize() happy path, HTML strip, length min/max, all 7 injection patterns, and truncate() helper. Target 100% line coverage of input_sanitizer.dart.

tasks.title: Add re-mount guard to RefinementFlowScreen
tasks.description: Prevent startRefinement from firing twice on hot reload. Add private _started flag in state. Also reset provider before starting if status != idle to handle navigation back-then-forward cleanly.

tasks.title: Typed router extra params
tasks.description: Replace 'state.extra as String?' with a typed RefinementParams data class. Update IdeaInputScreen call site to pass RefinementParams(ideaText: ...) and AppRouter to read state.extra as RefinementParams. Backward-compatible fallback for raw String.

tasks.title: Widget test for StepIndicator transitions
tasks.description: Create widget test that pumps StepIndicator with 3 steps, verifies each step renders correct state (pending, current, complete), then pumps with currentStep changes and verifies state transitions render correctly.

tasks.title: Add currentRoundRole getter + tests to RefinementState
tasks.description: Add a derived getter currentRoundRole returning the role of the current active round (null if no rounds). Cleaner than indexing externally. Add unit tests covering empty, idle, running, complete states.
